attributes.headline: This game-changing AI tool will transform everything
attributes.angle: The productivity claims will likely collapse once early adopters hit the tool's actual constraints and integration friction in real workflows.

attributes.output: The productivity claims will likely collapse once early adopters hit the tool's actual constraints and integration friction in real workflows.

1/ Most "productivity" tools measure gains in a vacuum. Spreadsheet says +40% efficiency. Reality: your workflow has 6 integration points. Tool handles 2 of them.
